explanation: The user instructs to pick up the pot and pour the water out of it into the sink. The pot is currently on the sinkbasin. First, I need to pick it up. Since I am holding it, I can then pour the water from it into the sinkbasin. The old plan already attempted to pick up and place the pot, but the current instruction specifies pouring the water out, so the action sequence is updated to reflect this intent. No additional motions are needed as the pour action directly uses the held object and the sinkbasin as the destination.
